stemHtml:
An aircraft had a total mass of 5 430 kg with a CG of 5.43 m aft of the datum line. After calculations, to return the CG within limits, an additional ballast of 210 kg was loaded. The aircraft's new CG is 5.56 m aft of the datum.
Determine where the additional ballast was loaded:

options.a: 1.35 m aft of the datum line.
options.b: 4.08 m fwd of the datum line.
options.c: 8.92 m aft of the datum line.
options.d: 9.05 m aft of the datum line.
